newest.message:
# Bug Fixes
- Fix a crash on startup with blank local characters or characters with expired ESI tokens.

release.message:
# Bug Fixes
- Fix a crash on startup with blank local characters or characters with expired ESI tokens.

datafile.name: eve-blueprints-en-US.xml.gzip
datafile.message: SDE 3409592 blueprints data file by the EVEMon Development Team NOT COMPATIBLE with EVEMon prior to version 2.2.0
